result.stdout:
Usage: xrest cs gen [-t|-test-client] -ns|-namespace <namespace> -o|-output <output> -s|-server <server>

generate client

Options:
  -t,  -test-client?  Generate test client. Is not ensuring success code and returns data wrapped in responses.
  -ns, -namespace     Root namespace for created classes.
  -o,  -output        Output directory. Will be removed if exists.
  -s,  -server        Server to load model from.
